overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Max Buffer ETF March (PMMR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one-year period. The exposure is reset annually in March PMMR was launched on Feb 28, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.
